title: Helpers--Pipelayers, Plumbers, Pipefitters, and Steamfitters
description: Help plumbers, pipefitters, steamfitters, or pipelayers by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include using, supplying, or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.text: Measure, cut, thread and assemble new pipe, placing the assembled pipe in hangers or other supports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut or drill holes in walls or floors to accommodate the passage of pipes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform rough-ins, repair and replace fixtures and water heaters, and locate, repair, or remove leaking or broken pipes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist pipe fitters in the layout, assembly, and installation of piping for air, ammonia, gas, and water systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut pipe and lift up to fitters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit or assist in fitting valves, couplings, or assemblies to tanks, pumps, or systems, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Requisition tools and equipment, select type and size of pipe, and collect and transport materials and equipment to work site.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mount brackets and hangers on walls and ceilings to hold pipes, and set sleeves or inserts to provide support for pipes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Excavate and grade ditches, and lay and join pipe for water and sewer service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble and remove damaged or worn pipe.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean shop, work area, and machines, using solvent and rags.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install gas burners to convert furnaces from wood, coal, or oil.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill pipes with sand or resin to prevent distortion, and hold pipes during bending and installation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Immerse pipe in chemical solution to remove dirt, oil, and scale.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
